title: MtYz RayGun VPB pack
description: Fight your adversaries with this famous wonder weapon and use its power aiming for glory. Addon for the mod Vic's Point Blank adding RayGun.
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/ohM4rxWl5lI" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

This is an addon pack for the mod Vic Point Blank or the newer fork version VPB:Jelly, this addon should work perfectly for every version that this two mods make from now on, meaning it works on 1.20.1 or 1.21.1 depending on the VPB version you are using.

On this addon pack you should expect find the "Ray Gun", The "Ray Gun" is a fantasy gun that made its first appearance on the COD (Call Of Duty) zombies franchise.
The gun is a plasma based gun that shoots lazer beams that explode on contact with enemies or solid blocks. 

This version of the pack is my latest update since the older version was pretty updated and had ton of bugs.

Now, enjoy and feel free to send feedback through my discord or YT channel.
